headline: Break the pattern today; dominate the weekend
summary: At +0.03kg/week you're losing ground fast; today you reverse course with meal discipline and planned exercise.
details: Eat only Huel today—no snacking, no exceptions, no emotional eating. Row for 30 minutes before work, then walk 15 minutes at lunch to interrupt the sedentary pattern. Thursday's choices set the tone for your weekend; succeed today and you own the next 72 hours instead of losing them to snacking.
